title: Living in Boulder blog 6 - 23 - 2017: Roman Geography Book

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night life update from Boulder, covering a deal he made with his mom to sell his car and do chores in exchange for not having to manage the sale himself, a bike ride they took together, and his ongoing project mapping ancient Rome using Google Earth and a Roman geography book organized alphabetically by building name.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to sell it but doesn't want to deal with the process himself; relieved mom will handle it
Excited and eager to finish it; believes the Google Earth trip visualization will be compelling
Positive about it as a daily activity and a way to make her life easier

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got up at around 11 in the morning at his mom's house because he was working until 4.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle and his mom came to an agreement that she will sell his car and he will still do chores.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle agreed to go on a bike ride every day with his mom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle and his mom rode their bikes from their house under a tunnel to the supermarket.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to ride his bike from his mom's house to his house and back tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wants to find out how far away someone can hear yelling for the purposes of his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle doesn't want to deal with selling his car because he is focused on his film projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is excited about finishing his Google Earth Rome project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is working on an alphabetical list of all the buildings in Rome for his Google Earth project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is currently on book A, which is dark blue and corresponds to the ages of Hercules.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks it would be cool to have a link to the 20 days in Rome and download locations on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is interested in rebuilding the layout of ancient Roman houses.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was listening to a book on church history and found it interesting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wants to do a project on aqueducts because he can build things around them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is looking forward to doing green screen work on his project.
